title: woodsia phillipsii
intro: Woodsia phillipsii, also known as Phillips' Woodsia, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae and is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The medicinal properties of Woodsia phillipsii include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Woodsia phillipsii can be made by infusing the dried fronds in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's extract to create a topical cream or ointment.
